headline: Is Fastenal Company (FAST) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is FAST a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Fastenal Company on The Wealth Dynasty Report’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on FAST. Fastenal Company’s share was trading at $44.45 as of March 23rd. FAST’s trailing and forward P/E were 40.15 and 36.10 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Fastenal […]
